TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine Version Update for ALG Client Machines
TimeEntry.Notes:
Successfully updated Manage Engine version 11.5.2600.32.W on the following machines for ALG Client:

  1. Machines Updated:
    • Carolina
    • ALG-HQ-LPT-02
    • Smita
    • DESKTOP-GC2H8I0
  2. Action Taken:
    • Installed Manage Engine version 11.5.2600.32.W on all listed machines.
    • Verified that the Manage Engine application and services are running without any issues.
    • Ensured successful synchronization and operation after the update.

TimeEntry.Title: Files saving error on machine DESKTOP-8S6IF2G for Jyoti Bansal
TimeEntry.Notes: Received the call on support from Jyoti Bansal for having issue while saving photoshop files to laptop. SO connected to her laptop. Troubleshoot the issue. The disk space on laptop was 2 GB free only. SO cleanup done on the laptop, reboot the laptop. Now the disk space has increased to 38 Gb and now user is able to save the files.

TimeEntry.Title: Unblock GOYA Emails
TimeEntry.Notes:
The user, Patricia Quezada, reached out requesting to whitelist the email address aseneth.camacho@goya.com as the emails from this address were being bounced back as undeliverable by the provider.

Action Taken:
We have successfully whitelisted the domain goya.com in the Microsoft 365 Security Center, which will prevent future issues with email delivery from aseneth.camacho@goya.com

Updated the same to user via email.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.150 on ALG-HQ-LPT-01,ALG-HQ-LPT-02,ALG-HQ-LPT-04,ALG-HQ-LPT-05
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on  is old version V0.14.146. Connected to the machines 
ALG-HQ-LPT-01,ALG-HQ-LPT-02,ALG-HQ-LPT-04,ALG-HQ-LPT-05 from manage engine download and installed the latest version Ver0.14.150. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version (11.5.2600.32.W) updated:- DESKTOP-F42DDF1, ALG-HQ-LPT-10
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.5.2600.32.W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine(DESKTOP-F42DDF1, ALG-HQ-LPT-10)and Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version

TimeEntry.Notes: Diana had issue with outlook sync and notification.

TimeEntry.Title: MyRemote Version Update for ALG-HQ-LPT16
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into ALG-HQ-LPT16. and checked the MyRemote version. The latest version 26.1.20.9571 has been successfully updated. Everything seems to be working fine now.

TimeEntry.Title: MyRemote Version Update for DEEPAKALGRO with 26.1.22.9573
TimeEntry.Notes:
• Issue: MyRemote version update required for DEEPAKALGRO machine.
  • Action Taken:
    • Logged into the DEEPAKALGRO machine.
    • Checked and confirmed the MyRemote version was outdated.
    • Updated to 26.1.22.9573.
  • Outcome: Version update completed successfully. Everything is working fine now.

TimeEntry.Title: diana outlook
TimeEntry.Notes: Assisted sean with the outlook issue. and check the rules on najmeh machine.

TimeEntry.Title: ALG-HQ-LPT-02 & ALG-RMT-LPT-01 : Manually patch update as APD failed to execute these
TimeEntry.Notes:
ALG-HQ-LPT-02

  • Installed update: .NET Desktop Runtime (x64) 6.0.36 (KB5047486)
  • Installed update: .NET Desktop Runtime (x64) 8.0.25 (KB5081277)
  • Installed: Microsoft Visual C++ 2015–2022 Redistributable (x86) v14.50.35719.0
  • Installed: Microsoft Visual C++ 2015–2022 Redistributable (x64) v14.50.35719.0
  • Installed: 2026-01 Cumulative Update Preview for .NET Framework 3.5 and 4.8.1 (KB5074828) – Windows 11 25H2 (x64)
  • Installed: 2026-03 Cumulative Update for Windows 11 25H2 (KB5086672) – OS Build 26200.8117
  • Updated: Foxit PDF Editor → v12.1.9.15762
  • Updated: Zoom Workplace (x64, user-based) → v7.0.1.34140
  • Updated: Intel Iris Xe Graphics driver (Alder Lake-UP3 GT2) → v32.0.101.7080

ALG-RMT-LPT-01

  • Installed: Microsoft Visual C++ 2015–2022 Redistributable (x64) v14.50.35719.0
  • Installed: 2026-01 Cumulative Update Preview for .NET Framework 3.5 and 4.8.1 (KB5074828) – Windows 11 25H2 (ARM64)
  • Verified that all patches are updated in the MyRMM database.
  • Windows updates are still pending final completion due to a required system reboot.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: APD failed to update Cisco umbrella, manually updated on ALG-HQ-LPT-06
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to ALG-HQ-LPT-06 machines and deployed the latest version of Cisco Secure Client (5.1.16.194). I verified all systems were successfully synced over cisco portal.

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote version 26.1.22.9573 updated on machine DESKTOP-F42DDF1,DESKTOP-GC2H8I0,HAILEY,PREYAPATEL
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine DESKTOP-F42DDF1,DESKTOP-GC2H8I0,HAILEY,PREYAPATEL
running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  .
Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 26.1.22.9573. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest
version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Not getting certain emails
TimeEntry.Notes:
Receiving the user request, logged into the office 365.

checked the mail flow for the requested both the emails.

Shared the screenshot about the mail received by the user.

Asked user to provide the exact email address to check and provide the exact data.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version ( 7.35.20709.0) updated on, ALG-HQ-LPT-04, ALG-HQ-LPT-04 & ALG-HQ-LPT-10
TimeEntry.Notes: After checking the CrowdStrike portal, I found that  Crowdstrike latest version updated Crowdstrike latest version updated ,on, ALG-HQ-LPT-04, ALG-HQ-LPT-04 & ALG-HQ-LPT-10  needed updates. I updated both to version 7.35.20709.0

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote version 26.1.22.9573 updated on machine ALG-HQ-LPT-12,ALG-HQ-LPT-13,ALG-HQ-LPT-14,CAROLINA
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine ALG-HQ-LPT-12,ALG-HQ-LPT-13,ALG-HQ-LPT-14,CAROLINA
running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine. Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 26.1.22.9573. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Not getting certain emails
TimeEntry.Notes:
Received a handover from the previous shift regarding the mailbox issue. Later, I received an email from Shelly with the same concern.

I logged into Office 365, traced the email from santander.onboarding@fispan.com, and found that it was delivered successfully to Shelly's mailbox. I informed Shelly that the email was delivered and suggested checking the junk folder or any existing mailbox rules for further clarification.

I attached a screenshot of the delivery details for better understanding.

I advised Shelly to contact us again if any further assistance is needed.

TimeEntry.Title: GoDaddy Login Credentials – Subdomain Purchase
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the message received from Shaundra, Carolina called in requesting assistance with a domain purchase. I called her back, and she requested access to the GoDaddy domain credentials in order to proceed with purchasing a subdomain. I worked on the user access request, coordinated internally to obtain the required approval, and received confirmation to proceed. The credentials were then shared with the user. It was also noted that MFA is enabled on our number, and coordination was done to provide the verification code at the time of login to ensure secure access.

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote Version Update for ALG-HQ-LPT-09 and DEEPAKALGRO to 26.1.25.9592
TimeEntry.Notes:
Received a request to My Remote update the ALG-HQ-LPT-09 and DEEPAKALGRO systems to version 26.1.22.9573.

The following actions were performed:

  1. Logged into both systems.
  2. Verified the current client versions.
  3. Downloaded and installed the latest client version 26.1.22.9573.
  4. Restarted both systems after the installation.
  5. Confirmed the successful update of the versions on both systems.
  6. Checked the systems to ensure they are running smoothly post-update.

Everything is functioning as expected after the update. If any issues arise, feel free to contact us for further assistance.

Ticket is now closed after the confirmation that both systems are updated successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: godaddy
TimeEntry.Notes: checked the go daddy credentials and logged in and checked and verified and sent to Carolina.  user wanted check subdomain- assisted.

TimeEntry.Title: Paola Pruitt Setup
TimeEntry.Notes: The Office 365 Standard license has been successfully purchased and assigned to the user. The same has been communicated to Dino and Paola.

TimeEntry.Title: joti with ALG needs assistance with her computer being very slow
TimeEntry.Notes: Received a call from Jyoti regarding a system hanging issue. I connected to the system and cleared the temporary files and prefetch files. After clearing the temp files, I asked the user to check if the system was running smoothly. Once confirmed, I closed the ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: One Drive Issue
TimeEntry.Notes:
Received a mail from Shahrokh regarding his inability to log into OneDrive. After reviewing the issue, I proceeded with resetting the password via Office 365 and provided the new login credentials to him. Shahrokh then logged into OneDrive both on the Chrome browser and desktop app.

Despite logging in successfully, OneDrive encountered a syncing issue. I advised Shahrokh to sign out or unlink OneDrive and then sign back in with the new credentials. After doing this, OneDrive entered syncing mode, and I informed him that it takes some time to complete.

I then accessed his computer remotely via SSH to verify the issue. After confirming that OneDrive was now syncing correctly, I updated Shahrokh on the situation, ensuring he was satisfied with the solution.

Once the issue was resolved and Shahrokh confirmed everything was working as expected, I closed the ticket. A confirmation email was sent to the user.

Ticket successfully closed after confirmation from Shahrokh.

TimeEntry.Title: ALG-HQ-LPT-10 has Missing patch while last run
TimeEntry.Notes:
I worked on the missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines. I downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed patches.then rebooted.Scanned the devices Some patches were not applicable due to compatibility issues. All previously missing patches were successfully updated.


 Patches The latest update for Microsoft Defender (1.449.47.0)

Machines:  ALG-HQ-LPT-10

TimeEntry.Notes: onedrive had issues syncing, login remove and add. tested from uploading documents on onedrive and pc. succesfully synced.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162 on ALG-HQ-LPT-13, ALG-HQ-LPT-09, Hailey, Algro, Carolina
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following servers on is old version V0.14.150. Connected to the machines (ALG-HQ-LPT-13, ALG-HQ-LPT-09, Hailey, Algro, Carolina) from manage engine, download and installed the latest version V0.14.162. TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine Synchronization Issue for ALG Machine ALG-HQ-LPT-10 and ALG-HQ-LPT-08
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines ALG-HQ-LPT-10 and ALG-HQ-LPT-08 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Jyoti with ALG need assistance with her computer screen going black with lines across it and the slowness of her system
TimeEntry.Notes: To resolve the slowness issue on the machine DESKTOP-8S6IF2G, we identified resource-heavy processes using Task Manager, such as Google Chrome and Outlook, and closed unnecessary applications. Adjusted the power settings to High Performance for optimal operation, and cleaned up temporary files and browser cache. A full antivirus scan was run to ensure there were no malware threats, and system drivers were updated for improved performance. We also disabled unnecessary startup programs, reviewed resource exhaustion logs, and restarted the system to apply the changes. After reboot asked user to check and confirm the performance, waiting for user response.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.162 on PREYAPATEL,DESKTOP-8S6IF2G,Smita,ALG-HQ-LPT-08
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on  is old version V0.14.150. Connected to the machines  PREYAPATEL,DESKTOP-8S6IF2G,Smita,ALG-HQ-LPT-08 from manage engine download and installed the latest version Ver0.14.162. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Penny - calender
TimeEntry.Notes: powershell, and setting up the user calender as requested,

TimeEntry.Title: Smita : Found myremote syncing issues due to old version, updated
TimeEntry.Notes: I found that the system had been idle for a long time, so I accessed the machine in the background and successfully updated MyRemote to the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: ALG-HQ-LPT-02,Algro,DESKTOP-8S6IF2G : APD missed to update cisco umbrella with latest version

TimeEntry.Title: ALG-HQ-LPT-07 : Deepak Bansal has invited you to join your team to use Foxit products

• Connected to Bianca’s system via remote session.
  • Installed the latest version of Foxit Editor and configured it successfully.
  • Removed previously installed Foxit Reader as part of the update process.
  • Verified the application is working as expected.
  • System is stable and user confirmed functionality.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Teams access
TimeEntry.Notes: Followed up with Penny regarding Teams access issue. Requested contact details to initiate direct troubleshooting, as contact information was not available in the provided sheet. Coordinating to connect with the user and diagnose the issue further. Waiting for user reply so that we can contact user and work on the issue
